name_en: M14178 Black & Color! LV x TM Passport Cover This classic Louis Vuitton x Murakami series passport cover is crafted from coated canvas with a simple design, embellished with the Monogram pattern reinterpreted in the iconic rainbow tones of artist Takashi Murakami, showcasing a lively playful style and adding a sophisticated touch to the journey. The passport cover is lined with calfskin and features multiple business card slots and pockets, making it exceptionally practical.
